rationale: Internal driver wire version constant set incorrectly; no spec rule specifies which minWireVersion value to use.
Update transactions count test for newer MongoDB version; test infrastructure update per DRIVERS-628.
Spurious INFO log messages due to unstable tag ordering in isMaster response; internal logging bug, no spec rule violated.
Improvement to send recoveryToken on abortTransaction per DRIVERS-635/SPEC-1279; spec-required field was missing.
MongoCommandException thrown instead of MongoWriteConcernException for write concern failures; deviates from documented API contract.
SocketChannel read/write ignores socket timeout; internal implementation bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Spec commit cited: driver must not send $readPreference to standalone servers; direct spec rule violation.
Proactive safety improvement: throw exception for async driver auto-encryption until async support added; not a spec violation.
Feature addition: add auto encryption support to legacy MongoClient; not a bug or spec nonconformance.
Documentation improvement for Client Side Encryption API docs; no driver behavior involved.
Server selection spec states single server always suitable for writes; driver refused to select secondary in direct mode.
Adding client-side encryption reference documentation; no driver behavior involved.
CI configuration to test MongoDB 4.2 in Evergreen; build/CI change with no spec involvement.
NPE in POJO codec when null EncoderContext passed with BasicDBObject; internal codec bug, no spec rule violated.
Reactive streams exception logging when publisher already terminated; internal error handling improvement, no spec rule.
Wrong exception thrown when mongocrypt_ctx_new returns null; libmongocrypt binding bug, no spec rule contradicted.
Two bugs in client-side encryption documentation examples; documentation errors, no driver behavior involved.
Explicit encryption with keyAltName not supported; CSFLE spec requires keyAltName as valid key specifier; SPEC-1337 filed.
Add FLE corpus test per DRIVERS-686; test infrastructure addition, not a driver behavior fix.
Javadoc website search returning 404 due to 'undefined' in URL; documentation website bug.
mavenLocal repository ordering in Gradle build file; build configuration change, no spec involvement.
Add prose test for explicit encryption with key alt name; test infrastructure addition linked to SPEC-1337.
Remove embedded Android package as MongoDB Mobile discontinued; packaging/build change.
Documentation page version number wrong (says 3.10 instead of 3.11); documentation typo.
Coverity-detected resource leak on exception path; static analysis finding, internal bug, no spec rule violated.
Implements spec section on size limits and wire protocol for client-side encryption; direct spec requirement.
Change stream resumable error definition in spec too broad; fix required spec amendment via DRIVERS-650.
Excessive memory allocation from unnecessary document unwrapping in bulk write; performance issue, no spec rule violated.
ChangeStreamBatchCursor swallows MongoInterruptedException making threads uninterruptible; threading bug, no spec rule.
Document toJson reorders _id to first position inconsistently vs BsonDocument; internal behavior, no spec on toJson ordering.
Spec says mongocryptdBypassSpawn=true must not retry; driver retries anyway; specific spec rule quoted in description.
Fix Java compiler overload-ambiguity warnings in OperationHelper.java; internal code quality, no spec involvement.
Database-level aggregation tested on server 3.6+ per DRIVERS-676; test infrastructure/CI update.
Resync CRUD spec tests to use transaction spec test format per DRIVERS-597; test infrastructure update.
Document JNDI ObjectFactory for new MongoClient in reference docs; documentation improvement.
Typo in Sorts.java Javadoc: descending methods have ascending docs; documentation typo.
Javadoc for updateOne/findOneAndUpdate doesn't mention replacement document; documentation improvement request.
POJO codec rejects same annotation on field and accessor; API ergonomics fix, no spec rule involved.
NPE in async AbstractSubscription when distinct returns null for missing field; internal queue bug, no spec rule.
@BsonIgnore ignored for overloaded setters; POJO codec implementation bug, no BSON spec rule on annotation handling.
Hide Subject details in MongoCredential#toString for security; hardening improvement, no spec rule violated.
Move reactive streams driver into main repository to reduce release friction; repository/build restructure.
CRUD spec requires error on empty update document; findOneAndUpdate treated it as no-op unlike updateOne.
Deprecate TlsChannelStreamFactoryFactory constructor taking internal class as parameter; API deprecation.
Remove deprecated API elements before 4.0 release; API cleanup with no spec involvement.
Remove outdated MongoDB 2.6 minimum version references from docs; documentation cleanup.
Reactive streams Observables emit NPE for null values from Void methods; internal async fix, no spec rule violated.
Add missing notifyMessageSent to Reactive Streams ClientSession API; internal API completeness, not a spec deviation.
Remove deprecated API elements in reactive streams driver; API cleanup before 4.0, no spec involvement.
Share JSON-powered sync spec test implementation with reactive streams; test infrastructure refactor.
